scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace @kunquwiki/api & npm run dev --workspace @kunquwiki/web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @kunquwiki/shared && npm run build --workspace @kunquwiki/api && npm run build --workspace @kunquwiki/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @kunquwiki/api && npm run lint --workspace @kunquwiki/web
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @kunquwiki/api && node --import tsx --test apps/api/test/*.test.mjs apps/web/test/*.test.ts
